description_long: This sculpture is a finely detailed bust of a man with a prominent mustache and wavy hair, rendered in a bronze-like material. The bust is mounted on a glossy black rectangular pedestal, which features a gold plaque on the front. The facial features are expressive, with deep-set eyes, a furrowed brow, and a downward gaze, giving the figure a contemplative appearance. The hair is sculpted with visible texture and volume, and the neck and upper chest are included in the bust. The base is solid and geometric, providing a strong visual contrast to the organic form of the bust. The plaque on the front of the base contains engraved text, indicating the subject or honoree and the year 2017.
description: A bronze-colored bust of a man with wavy hair and mustache, mounted on a glossy black pedestal with a gold plaque. The sculpture is detailed and expressive, with a strong visual contrast between the organic bust and the geometric base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed face, mustache, and gold plaque on the pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, textured hair, and the depth of the bust.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head and neck, with the smooth, unadorned back of the pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face and the sculpted hair, similar to the left but mirrored.
attribute_subject_matter: bust of a man with mustache and wavy hair
attribute_location_context: The sculpture appears suited for display in an indoor or outdoor public space, such as a plaza, park, or building lobby.
